runtime-minizip.description: Production ZIP reader/writer support for stored and DEFLATE XLSX packages.

images.description: PNG/JPEG metadata, decoding, streaming insertion, and existing-media replacement support.

planned-xml.description: Future XML/parser dependencies that are not linked by the current implementation.

planned-dev.description: Planned development dependencies for future test and benchmark integration. These ports are not wired into CMake yet.

reference-benchmarks.description: Opt-in third-party XLSX writer libraries used only by standalone benchmark adapters.
